### Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Docs updated (module README, TSDoc, threat model if surface changed)
- [ ] No breaking change without an ADR in `docs/adr/`
- [ ] No new dependency without justification in commit
- [ ] No `child_process.exec`, `eval`, network calls, or shell strings introduced
